<analysis>
Let me trace through the conversation chronologically:

1. **Initial Request**: User asked to redesign the footer component (`@apps/web/src/components/layout/footer/`) based on design specs in docs, using mockups (visual companion).

2. **Brainstorming Phase**: Used the superpowers:brainstorming skill to explore context, offer visual companion, and ask clarifying questions.

3. **Context Exploration**: Agent explored all footer files (Footer.tsx, FooterInfo.tsx, GatewayInfo.tsx, config.ts, LocaleSwitcher.tsx, OwnerName.tsx, VercelPoweredBy.tsx) and all 18 design specs in docs/superpowers/specs/.

4. **Visual Companion**: Started a browser-based mockup server at localhost:64508.

5. **Design Decisions**:
   - Layout: User chose **C (Asymmetric Split)** - brand left, link columns right
   - Mobile: User chose **C3 (Flat Inline Flow)** - brand top, links inline with dot separators
   - Boundary: User chose **D1 (Gradient Fade)** - no hard border-t
   - User approved the full design

6. **Design Spec Written**: `docs/superpowers/specs/2026-03-16-footer-redesign-design.md`
   - Went through spec review loop, fixed issues (wrong CSS variable --root-bg → --color-root-bg, neutral color tier violations, VercelPoweredBy clarification, etc.)

7. **Implementation Plan Written**: `docs/superpowers/plans/2026-03-16-footer-redesign-implementation.md`
   - Went through plan review, fixed issues (SubscribeTextButton trailing dot, missing key={count}, hardcoded "Links" label)

8. **Implementation**:
   - Rewrote Footer.tsx - gradient fade + restructured container
   - Rewrote FooterInfo.tsx - asymmetric split desktop, flat inline mobile
   - Modified GatewayInfo.tsx - simplified to inline dot indicator
   - Added i18n keys for footer_links_label

9. **User Feedback Round 1**: "不够大气" (not spacious/grand enough), language selector and theme switcher need redesign
   - Created v2 mockup with more spacing
   - User chose "Alternative Controls — Text-only" for bottom bar

10. **Implementation v2**:
    - Created FooterThemeSwitcher.tsx - text-only theme switcher (Light · System · Dark)
    - Updated Footer.tsx to use FooterThemeSwitcher instead of ThemeSwitcher
    - Updated FooterInfo.tsx - controls moved to bottom bar, more spacious layout

11. **User Feedback Round 2**: "整体的字体都太小了。你要注意 text-base 就是 14px 的" - all fonts too small, base is 14px not 16px
    - Recalibrated all font sizes upward

12. **User Feedback Round 3**: "xs 也小。最小不能小于 sm" - minimum font size must be text-sm (12.25px)
    - Changed all text-xs and smaller to text-sm

13. **User Feedback Round 4**: "向右对齐？" - link columns should be right-aligned
    - Added justify-end to FooterLinkColumns

14. **User Feedback Round 5**: "gap-x 调大一点" - increase gap between link columns
    - User changed gap to gap-30 (they modified it themselves to gap-30)

15. **User Feedback Round 6**: "这里的文案太重复了" - theme switcher text too verbose (was using aria labels)
    - Changed to short labels: Light · System · Dark

16. **User Feedback Round 7**: "mobile 上的有点怪" - mobile bottom row wrapping badly
    - Split into two rows: RSS/Sitemap/Subscribe on one line, theme+locale on another

17. **Commit and Push**: User asked to commit and push, then cleanup unused i18n keys
    - Committed footer redesign files
    - Removed unused api_fetchError key from error messages
    - Both pushed to remote

Key files modified:
- `apps/web/src/components/layout/footer/Footer.tsx` - complete rewrite
- `apps/web/src/components/layout/footer/FooterInfo.tsx` - complete rewrite  
- `apps/web/src/components/layout/footer/GatewayInfo.tsx` - modified
- `apps/web/src/components/layout/footer/FooterThemeSwitcher.tsx` - new file
- `apps/web/src/messages/{en,zh,ja}/common.json` - added footer_links_label
- `apps/web/src/messages/{en,zh,ja}/error.json` - removed api_fetchError
- `docs/superpowers/specs/2026-03-16-footer-redesign-design.md` - design spec
- `docs/superpowers/plans/2026-03-16-footer-redesign-implementation.md` - plan

Important patterns:
- 14px base font size means text-base=14px, text-sm=12.25px, text-xl=17.5px
- Minimum text size is text-sm (12.25px)
- Neutral color system: 1-10 with three tiers, neutral-5 only for decorative, neutral-6 minimum for small text
- CSS variables: --color-root-bg (not --root-bg), --footer-bg
- Design language: 書写·信纸·光影 - no glassmorphism, soft shadows, serif typography, ink-pressure interactions

<summary>
1. Primary Request and Intent:
   The user requested a complete visual redesign of the footer component (`apps/web/src/components/layout/footer/`) following the existing 書写·信纸·光影 (Writing · Letter Paper · Light & Shadow) design language documented in `docs/superpowers/specs/`. All existing functionality was to be preserved (link sections, bottom info, powered by, GatewayInfo, controls). The user wanted mockup-driven design iteration with a visual companion browser tool. After implementation, the user requested commit, push, and cleanup of unused i18n keys.

2. Key Technical Concepts:
   - **14px base font size**: `text-base`=14px, `text-sm`=12.25px, `text-lg`=15.75px, `text-xl`=17.5px. Minimum allowed text size is `text-sm`.
   - **書写·信纸·光影 design language**: No glassmorphism, soft shadows, serif typography, ink-pressure interactions, paper metaphor
   - **Neutral color system**: neutral-1 through neutral-10, three tiers (1-4 surface, 5-7 border/secondary, 8-10 body). `text-neutral-5` only for decorative elements, `text-neutral-6` minimum for readable text.
   - **CSS variables**: `--color-root-bg` (NOT `--root-bg`), `--footer-bg` — both generated in `accent-color.ts`
   - **Next.js App Router**: async Server Components for Footer/FooterInfo/PoweredBy, client components for GatewayInfo/FooterThemeSwitcher/LocaleSwitcher
   - **next-intl**: i18n with `getTranslations` (server) / `useTranslations` (client), supports en/zh/ja
   - **Tailwind CSS v4**: CSS-first config, custom semantic tokens, auto-inverting neutral colors (no `dark:` prefix needed for neutrals)

3. Files and Code Sections:

   - **`apps/web/src/components/layout/footer/Footer.tsx`** (rewritten)
     - Outer container with gradient fade boundary replacing `border-t`
     - Passes `FooterThemeSwitcher` and `LocaleSwitcher` as props to `FooterInfo`
     ```tsx
     import { FooterInfo } from './FooterInfo'
     import { FooterThemeSwitcher } from './FooterThemeSwitcher'
     import { LocaleSwitcher } from './LocaleSwitcher'

     export const Footer = async () => (
       <>
         <div data-hide-print className="relative z-[1] mt-32 h-9 md:h-16"
           style={{ background: 'linear-gradient(to bottom, var(--color-root-bg, #fff), var(--footer-bg))' }} />
         <footer data-hide-print className="relative z-[1] bg-[var(--footer-bg)] pb-12 pt-0">
           <div className="px-4 sm:px-8">
             <div className="mx-auto max-w-7xl lg:px-8">
               <FooterInfo localeSwitcher={<LocaleSwitcher />} themeSwitcher={<FooterThemeSwitcher />} />
             </div>
           </div>
         </footer>
       </>
     )
     ```

   - **`apps/web/src/components/layout/footer/FooterInfo.tsx`** (complete rewrite ~330 lines)
     - Desktop: asymmetric split with brand column left (w-70) + link columns right-aligned (justify-end, gap-30)
     - Mobile: brand top → flat inline links with dot separators → stacked bottom controls
     - Bottom bar: `RSS · Sitemap · Subscribe | Light · System · Dark | 語言 ▾ ──── ICP`
     - Key components: `FooterInfo`, `DotSep`, `SectionSep`, `FooterLinkColumns`, `FooterLinkInline`, `StyledLink`, `PoweredBy`
     - All text sizes minimum `text-sm` (12.25px), owner name `text-xl` desktop / `text-lg` mobile
     - `SubscribeTextButton` wraps `<DotSep />` as children to avoid trailing separator when hidden
     - Link columns use `text-sm leading-[2.6]`, section labels use `text-sm font-medium uppercase tracking-[3px]`

   - **`apps/web/src/components/layout/footer/FooterThemeSwitcher.tsx`** (new file)
     - Text-only theme switcher showing "Light · System · Dark"
     - Active theme gets underline styling, others get neutral-6 with hover transition
     - Uses `transitionViewIfSupported` + `flushSync` for theme transitions (same pattern as original ThemeSwitcher)
     ```tsx
     const labels: Record<string, string> = { light: 'Light', system: 'System', dark: 'Dark' }
     // ariaLabels uses t('aria_theme_*') for accessibility
     // Active: 'text-neutral-8 underline decoration-current/30 underline-offset-2'
     // Inactive: 'text-neutral-6 transition-colors duration-200 hover:text-neutral-8'
     ```

   - **`apps/web/src/components/layout/footer/GatewayInfo.tsx`** (modified)
     - Added `useSocketIsConnect()` to main `GatewayInfo` component
     - Added 5px colored dot before viewer count text (green connected, red disconnected)
     - Preserved `key={count}` on trigger span for NumberFlow animation
     - Radial gradient indicator kept only in Help tooltip

   - **`apps/web/src/messages/{en,zh,ja}/common.json`** — added `footer_links_label` key (Links/链接/リンク)
   - **`apps/web/src/messages/{en,zh,ja}/error.json`** — removed unused `api_fetchError` key
   - **`docs/superpowers/specs/2026-03-16-footer-redesign-design.md`** — design spec (committed)
   - **`docs/superpowers/plans/2026-03-16-footer-redesign-implementation.md`** — implementation plan (committed)

4. Errors and fixes:
   - **Wrong CSS variable name**: Used `--root-bg` but codebase uses `--color-root-bg`. Fixed in spec and implementation.
   - **Neutral color tier violations**: Used `text-neutral-5` for readable text and `text-neutral-4` for labels. Fixed to `text-neutral-6` minimum for text, `text-neutral-5` only for decorative dots.
   - **SubscribeTextButton trailing dot separator**: When `canSubscribe` returns false, `<DotSep />` before it would render with nothing after. Fixed by passing `<DotSep />` as children to `SubscribeTextButton`.
   - **Missing key={count}**: Original GatewayInfo had `key={count}` on trigger span for NumberFlow animation. Was omitted in rewrite, restored.
   - **User feedback: "不够大气"**: Footer wasn't spacious enough. Increased gaps (gap-20→gap-30), padding (pb-8→pb-12), owner name size, gradient height, and moved controls to bottom bar.
   - **User feedback: "text-base 就是 14px"**: All font sizes were calibrated assuming 16px base. Recalibrated everything upward.
   - **User feedback: "最小不能小于 sm"**: Changed all `text-xs` (10.5px) and smaller to `text-sm` (12.25px) minimum.
   - **User feedback: "向右对齐"**: Link columns needed right-alignment. Added `justify-end` to FooterLinkColumns.
   - **User feedback: "文案太重复了"**: ThemeSwitcher was using aria labels ("切换到浅色主题") as display text. Changed to short labels (Light/System/Dark) with aria labels kept for accessibility.
   - **User feedback: mobile wrapping**: Bottom row content too wide for mobile. Split into two rows (RSS line + controls line).
   - **Variable name collision**: `t` from `useTranslations` conflicted with `t` from `themes.map((t, i))`. Renamed to `tc`.
   - **Unused i18n key**: Test found `api_fetchError` in error namespace was unused. Removed from all 3 locales.

5. Problem Solving:
   - Designed footer through iterative mockup-driven process with visual companion
   - Went through formal spec review and plan review loops catching issues before implementation
   - Handled multiple rounds of user visual feedback, adjusting spacing, font sizes, layout alignment, and control design
   - Created a new footer-specific ThemeSwitcher component rather than trying to restyle the existing segmented control
   - All lint checks pass (footer files have zero errors; IDE TypeScript diagnostics about `Property 'div' does not exist` are false positives from the IDE's language server not resolving project tsconfig)

6. All user messages:
   - "根据 design spec in docs，重新设计 @apps/web/src/components/layout/footer/ . 使用 mockup"
   - "ok" (accepting visual companion)
   - "A" (keep all content blocks, visual redesign only)
   - "C mobile 呢" (asking about mobile layout for option C)
   - "C3" (choosing flat inline flow for mobile)
   - "D1" (choosing gradient fade boundary)
   - "可以 开始实现" (approving design, start implementation)
   - "开始" (start executing the plan)
   - "不够大气哇。而且languageSelector 和 themeswitch 也要重新 layout。themeswitch 需要重新 design 下" (with screenshot)
   - "Alternative Controls — Text-only" (choosing text-only controls variant)
   - "整体的字体都太小了。你要注意 text-base 就是 14px 的，所以不能当做 16px 去处理"
   - "xs 也小。最小不能小于 sm"
   - "向右对齐？" (with screenshot showing link columns should be right-aligned)
   - "gap-x 调大一点"
   - "这里的文案太重复了" (with screenshot of verbose theme switcher text)
   - "mobile 上的有点怪" (with screenshot of broken mobile layout)
   - "commit and push"
   - "cleanup 过时的 i18n keys"

7. Pending Tasks:
   - None explicitly pending. All requested work (redesign, commit, push, i18n cleanup) has been completed.

8. Current Work:
   The most recent work was cleaning up unused i18n keys. The user asked "cleanup 过时的 i18n keys" after committing and pushing the footer redesign. Ran the message-usage test, found `api_fetchError` was unused in the `error` namespace, removed it from all 3 locale files (en/zh/ja), verified the test passes, committed and pushed. This task is complete.

   There are also unstaged changes in the working tree that are NOT from this work: `apps/web/next-env.d.ts`, `apps/web/src/components/ui/modal/stacked/modal.tsx`, `apps/web/src/lib/fonts.ts`, `apps/web/src/styles/tailwindcss.css` — these were pre-existing modifications not related to the footer redesign.

9. Optional Next Step:
   No pending next steps. All user requests have been fulfilled. The footer redesign is committed and pushed, and unused i18n keys have been cleaned up.
</summary>

     1→import { atom, useStore } from 'jotai'
     2→import type { FC, PropsWithChildren, ReactNode } from 'react'
     3→import * as React from 'react'
     4→import { useEffect, useImperativeHandle, useMemo, useState } from 'react'
     5→import { Drawer } from 'vaul'
     6→
     7→import { SheetContext } from './context'
     8→
     9→export interface PresentSheetProps {
    10→  content: ReactNode | FC
    11→  defaultOpen?: boolean
    12→  dismissible?: boolean
    13→  onOpenChange?: (value: boolean) => void
    14→  open?: boolean
    15→  title?: ReactNode
    16→  triggerAsChild?: boolean
    17→
    18→  zIndex?: number
    19→}
    20→
    21→export const sheetStackAtom = atom([] as HTMLDivElement[])
    22→
    23→export type SheetRef = {
    24→  dismiss: () => void
    25→}
    26→
    27→export const PresentSheet = ({
    28→  ref,
    29→  ...props
    30→}: PropsWithChildren<PresentSheetProps> & {
    31→  ref?: React.RefObject<SheetRef | null>
    32→}) => {
    33→  const {
    34→    content,
    35→    children,
    36→    zIndex = 1000,
    37→    title,
    38→    dismissible = true,
    39→    defaultOpen,
    40→    triggerAsChild,
    41→  } = props
    42→
    43→  const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = useState(props.open ?? defaultOpen)
    44→
    45→  useImperativeHandle(ref, () => ({
    46→    dismiss: () => {
    47→      setIsOpen(false)
    48→    },
    49→  }))
    50→
    51→  const nextRootProps = useMemo(() => {
    52→    const nextProps = {
    53→      onOpenChange: setIsOpen,
    54→    } as any
    55→    if (isOpen !== undefined) {
    56→      nextProps.open = isOpen
    57→    }
    58→
    59→    if (props.onOpenChange !== undefined) {
    60→      nextProps.onOpenChange = (v: boolean) => {
    61→        setIsOpen(v)
    62→        props.onOpenChange?.(v)
    63→      }
    64→    }
    65→
    66→    return nextProps
    67→  }, [props, isOpen, setIsOpen])
    68→
    69→  useEffect(() => {
    70→    if (props.open !== undefined) {
    71→      setIsOpen(props.open)
    72→    }
    73→  }, [props.open])
    74→  const [holderRef, setHolderRef] = useState<HTMLDivElement | null>()
    75→  const store = useStore()
    76→
    77→  useEffect(() => {
    78→    const holder = holderRef
    79→    if (!holder) return
    80→    store.set(sheetStackAtom, (p) => p.concat(holder))
    81→
    82→    return () => {
    83→      store.set(sheetStackAtom, (p) => p.filter((item) => item !== holder))
    84→    }
    85→  }, [holderRef, store])
    86→
    87→  const { Root } = Drawer
    88→
    89→  const overlayZIndex = zIndex - 1
    90→  const contentZIndex = zIndex
    91→
    92→  return (
    93→    <Root dismissible={dismissible} {...nextRootProps}>
    94→      {!!children && (
    95→        <Drawer.Trigger asChild={triggerAsChild}>{children}</Drawer.Trigger>
    96→      )}
    97→      <Drawer.Portal>
    98→        <Drawer.Content
    99→          className="fixed inset-x-0 bottom-0 flex max-h-[calc(100svh-5rem)] flex-col rounded-t-[10px] bg-neutral-1 p-4"
   100→          style={{
   101→            zIndex: contentZIndex,
   102→          }}
   103→        >
   104→          {dismissible && (
   105→            <div className="mx-auto mb-8 h-1.5 w-12 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-neutral-4" />
   106→          )}
   107→
   108→          {title && (
   109→            <Drawer.Title className="-mt-4 mb-4 flex justify-center text-lg font-medium">
   110→              {title}
   111→            </Drawer.Title>
   112→          )}
   113→
   114→          <SheetContext
   115→            value={useMemo(
   116→              () => ({
   117→                dismiss() {
   118→                  setIsOpen(false)
   119→                },
   120→              }),
   121→              [setIsOpen],
   122→            )}
   123→          >
   124→            {typeof content === 'function'
   125→              ? React.createElement(content)
   126→              : content}
   127→          </SheetContext>
   128→          <div ref={setHolderRef} />
   129→        </Drawer.Content>
   130→        <Drawer.Overlay
   131→          className="fixed inset-0 bg-neutral-9/40"
   132→          style={{
   133→            zIndex: overlayZIndex,
   134→          }}
   135→        />
   136→      </Drawer.Portal>
   137→    </Root>
   138→  )
   139→}
   140→
```

    38→export const ModalInternal: Component<{

    40→  index: number
    41→
    42→  isTop: boolean

    44→}> = memo(({ item, index, onClose: onPropsClose, children, isTop }) => {

    11→    transition: { duration: 0.2, ease: MODAL_EASING },
    12→  },
    13→  transition: { duration: 0.3, ease: MODAL_EASING },
    14→}
    15→
    16→export const MODAL_STACK_Z_INDEX = 100
    17→
```
</details></tool-use>

 `<HOME>/.claude/plugins/cache/claude-plugins-official/superpowers/5.0.2/skills/brainstorming/visual-companion.md`

```text
     1→# Visual Companion Guide
     2→
     3→Browser-based visual brainstorming companion for showing mockups, diagrams, and options.
     4→
     5→## When to Use
     6→
     7→Decide per-question, not per-session. The test: **would the user understand this better by seeing it than reading it?**
     8→
     9→**Use the browser** when the content itself is visual:
    10→
    11→- **UI mockups** — wireframes, layouts, navigation structures, component designs
    12→- **Architecture diagrams** — system components, data flow, relationship maps
    13→- **Side-by-side visual comparisons** — comparing two layouts, two color schemes, two design directions
    14→- **Design polish** — when the question is about look and feel, spacing, visual hierarchy
    15→- **Spatial relationships** — state machines, flowcharts, entity relationships rendered as diagrams
    16→
    17→**Use the terminal** when the content is text or tabular:
    18→
    19→- **Requirements and scope questions** — "what does X mean?", "which features are in scope?"
    20→- **Conceptual A/B/C choices** — picking between approaches described in words
    21→- **Tradeoff lists** — pros/cons, comparison tables
    22→- **Technical decisions** — API design, data modeling, architectural approach selection
    23→- **Clarifying questions** — anything where the answer is words, not a visual preference
    24→
    25→A question *about* a UI topic is not automatically a visual question. "What kind of wizard do you want?" is conceptual — use the terminal. "Which of these wizard layouts feels right?" is visual — use the browser.
    26→
    27→## How It Works
    28→
    29→The server watches a directory for HTML files and serves the newest one to the browser. You write HTML content, the user sees it in their browser and can click to select options. Selections are recorded to a `.events` file that you read on your next turn.
    30→
    31→**Content fragments vs full documents:** If your HTML file starts with `<!DOCTYPE` or `<html`, the server serves it as-is (just injects the helper script). Otherwise, the server automatically wraps your content in the frame template — adding the header, CSS theme, selection indicator, and all interactive infrastructure. **Write content fragments by default.** Only write full documents when you need complete control over the page.
    32→
    33→## Starting a Session
    34→
    35→```bash
    36→# Start server with persistence (mockups saved to project)
    37→scripts/start-server.sh --project-dir /path/to/project
    38→
    39→# Returns: {"type":"server-started","port":52341,"url":"http://localhost:52341",
    40→#           "screen_dir":"/path/to/project/.superpowers/brainstorm/12345-1706000000"}
    41→```
    42→
    43→Save `screen_dir` from the response. Tell user to open the URL.
    44→
    45→**Finding connection info:** The server writes its startup JSON to `$SCREEN_DIR/.server-info`. If you launched the server in the background and didn't capture stdout, read that file to get the URL and port. When using `--project-dir`, check `<project>/.superpowers/brainstorm/` for the session directory.
    46→
    47→**Note:** Pass the project root as `--project-dir` so mockups persist in `.superpowers/brainstorm/` and survive server restarts. Without it, files go to `/tmp` and get cleaned up. Remind the user to add `.superpowers/` to `.gitignore` if it's not already there.
    48→
    49→**Launching the server by platform:**
    50→
    51→**Claude Code:**
    52→```bash
    53→# Default mode works — the script backgrounds the server itself
    54→scripts/start-server.sh --project-dir /path/to/project
    55→```
    56→
    57→**Codex:**
    58→```bash
    59→# Codex reaps background processes. The script auto-detects CODEX_CI and
    60→# switches to foreground mode. Run it normally — no extra flags needed.
    61→scripts/start-server.sh --project-dir /path/to/project
    62→```
    63→
    64→**Gemini CLI:**
    65→```bash
    66→# Use --foreground and set is_background: true on your shell tool call
    67→# so the process survives across turns
    68→scripts/start-server.sh --project-dir /path/to/project --foreground
    69→```
    70→
    71→**Other environments:** The server must keep running in the background across conversation turns. If your environment reaps detached processes, use `--foreground` and launch the command with your platform's background execution mechanism.
    72→
    73→If the URL is unreachable from your browser (common in remote/containerized setups), bind a non-loopback host:
    74→
    75→```bash
    76→scripts/start-server.sh \
    77→  --project-dir /path/to/project \
    78→  --host 0.0.0.0 \
    79→  --url-host localhost
    80→```
    81→
    82→Use `--url-host` to control what hostname is printed in the returned URL JSON.
    83→
    84→## The Loop
    85→
    86→1. **Check server is alive**, then **write HTML** to a new file in `screen_dir`:
    87→   - Before each write, check that `$SCREEN_DIR/.server-info` exists. If it doesn't (or `.server-stopped` exists), the server has shut down — restart it with `start-server.sh` before continuing. The server auto-exits after 30 minutes of inactivity.
    88→   - Use semantic filenames: `platform.html`, `visual-style.html`, `layout.html`
    89→   - **Never reuse filenames** — each screen gets a fresh file
    90→   - Use Write tool — **never use cat/heredoc** (dumps noise into terminal)
    91→   - Server automatically serves the newest file
    92→
    93→2. **Tell user what to expect and end your turn:**
    94→   - Remind them of the URL (every step, not just first)
    95→   - Give a brief text summary of what's on screen (e.g., "Showing 3 layout options for the homepage")
    96→   - Ask them to respond in the terminal: "Take a look and let me know what you think. Click to select an option if you'd like."
    97→
    98→3. **On your next turn** — after the user responds in the terminal:
    99→   - Read `$SCREEN_DIR/.events` if it exists — this contains the user's browser interactions (clicks, selections) as JSON lines
   100→   - Merge with the user's terminal text to get the full picture
   101→   - The terminal message is the primary feedback; `.events` provides structured interaction data
   102→
   103→4. **Iterate or advance** — if feedback changes current screen, write a new file (e.g., `layout-v2.html`). Only move to the next question when the current step is validated.
   104→
   105→5. **Unload when returning to terminal** — when the next step doesn't need the browser (e.g., a clarifying question, a tradeoff discussion), push a waiting screen to clear the stale content:
   106→
   107→   ```html
   108→   <!-- filename: waiting.html (or waiting-2.html, etc.) -->
   109→   <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;min-height:60vh">
   110→     <p class="subtitle">Continuing in terminal...</p>
   111→   </div>
   112→   ```
   113→
   114→   This prevents the user from staring at a resolved choice while the conversation has moved on. When the next visual question comes up, push a new content file as usual.
   115→
   116→6. Repeat until done.
   117→
   118→## Writing Content Fragments
   119→
   120→Write just the content that goes inside the page. The server wraps it in the frame template automatically (header, theme CSS, selection indicator, and all interactive infrastructure).
   121→
   122→**Minimal example:**
   123→
   124→```html
   125→<h2>Which layout works better?</h2>
   126→<p class="subtitle">Consider readability and visual hierarchy</p>
   127→
   128→<div class="options">
   129→  <div class="option" data-choice="a" onclick="toggleSelect(this)">
   130→    <div class="letter">A</div>
   131→    <div class="content">
   132→      <h3>Single Column</h3>
   133→      <p>Clean, focused reading experience</p>
   134→    </div>
   135→  </div>
   136→  <div class="option" data-choice="b" onclick="toggleSelect(this)">
   137→    <div class="letter">B</div>
   138→    <div class="content">
   139→      <h3>Two Column</h3>
   140→      <p>Sidebar navigation with main content</p>
   141→    </div>
   142→  </div>
   143→</div>
   144→```
   145→
   146→That's it. No `<html>`, no CSS, no `<script>` tags needed. The server provides all of that.
   147→
   148→## CSS Classes Available
   149→
   150→The frame template provides these CSS classes for your content:
   151→
   152→### Options (A/B/C choices)
   153→
   154→```html
   155→<div class="options">
   156→  <div class="option" data-choice="a" onclick="toggleSelect(this)">
   157→    <div class="letter">A</div>
   158→    <div class="content">
   159→      <h3>Title</h3>
   160→      <p>Description</p>
   161→    </div>
   162→  </div>
   163→</div>
   164→```
   165→
   166→**Multi-select:** Add `data-multiselect` to the container to let users select multiple options. Each click toggles the item. The indicator bar shows the count.
   167→
   168→```html
   169→<div class="options" data-multiselect>
   170→  <!-- same option markup — users can select/deselect multiple -->
   171→</div>
   172→```
   173→
   174→### Cards (visual designs)
   175→
   176→```html
   177→<div class="cards">
   178→  <div class="card" data-choice="design1" onclick="toggleSelect(this)">
   179→    <div class="card-image"><!-- mockup content --></div>
   180→    <div class="card-body">
   181→      <h3>Name</h3>
   182→      <p>Description</p>
   183→    </div>
   184→  </div>
   185→</div>
   186→```
   187→
   188→### Mockup container
   189→
   190→```html
   191→<div class="mockup">
   192→  <div class="mockup-header">Preview: Dashboard Layout</div>
   193→  <div class="mockup-body"><!-- your mockup HTML --></div>
   194→</div>
   195→```
   196→
   197→### Split view (side-by-side)
   198→
   199→```html
   200→<div class="split">
   201→  <div class="mockup"><!-- left --></div>
   202→  <div class="mockup"><!-- right --></div>
   203→</div>
   204→```
   205→
   206→### Pros/Cons
   207→
   208→```html
   209→<div class="pros-cons">
   210→  <div class="pros"><h4>Pros</h4><ul><li>Benefit</li></ul></div>
   211→  <div class="cons"><h4>Cons</h4><ul><li>Drawback</li></ul></div>
   212→</div>
   213→```
   214→
   215→### Mock elements (wireframe building blocks)
   216→
   217→```html
   218→<div class="mock-nav">Logo | Home | About | Contact</div>
   219→<div style="display: flex;">
   220→  <div class="mock-sidebar">Navigation</div>
   221→  <div class="mock-content">Main content area</div>
   222→</div>
   223→<button class="mock-button">Action Button</button>
   224→<input class="mock-input" placeholder="Input field">
   225→<div class="placeholder">Placeholder area</div>
   226→```
   227→
   228→### Typography and sections
   229→
   230→- `h2` — page title
   231→- `h3` — section heading
   232→- `.subtitle` — secondary text below title
   233→- `.section` — content block with bottom margin
   234→- `.label` — small uppercase label text
   235→
   236→## Browser Events Format
   237→
   238→When the user clicks options in the browser, their interactions are recorded to `$SCREEN_DIR/.events` (one JSON object per line). The file is cleared automatically when you push a new screen.
   239→
   240→```jsonl
   241→{"type":"click","choice":"a","text":"Option A - Simple Layout","timestamp":1706000101}
   242→{"type":"click","choice":"c","text":"Option C - Complex Grid","timestamp":1706000108}
   243→{"type":"click","choice":"b","text":"Option B - Hybrid","timestamp":1706000115}
   244→```
   245→
   246→The full event stream shows the user's exploration path — they may click multiple options before settling. The last `choice` event is typically the final selection, but the pattern of clicks can reveal hesitation or preferences worth asking about.
   247→
   248→If `.events` doesn't exist, the user didn't interact with the browser — use only their terminal text.
   249→
   250→## Design Tips
   251→
   252→- **Scale fidelity to the question** — wireframes for layout, polish for polish questions
   253→- **Explain the question on each page** — "Which layout feels more professional?" not just "Pick one"
   254→- **Iterate before advancing** — if feedback changes current screen, write a new version
   255→- **2-4 options max** per screen
   256→- **Use real content when it matters** — for a photography portfolio, use actual images (Unsplash). Placeholder content obscures design issues.
   257→- **Keep mockups simple** — focus on layout and structure, not pixel-perfect design
   258→
   259→## File Naming
   260→
   261→- Use semantic names: `platform.html`, `visual-style.html`, `layout.html`
   262→- Never reuse filenames — each screen must be a new file
   263→- For iterations: append version suffix like `layout-v2.html`, `layout-v3.html`
   264→- Server serves newest file by modification time
   265→
   266→## Cleaning Up
   267→
   268→```bash
   269→scripts/stop-server.sh $SCREEN_DIR
   270→```
   271→
   272→If the session used `--project-dir`, mockup files persist in `.superpowers/brainstorm/` for later reference. Only `/tmp` sessions get deleted on stop.
   273→
   274→## Reference
   275→
   276→- Frame template (CSS reference): `scripts/frame-template.html`
   277→- Helper script (client-side): `scripts/helper.js`
   278→
```
</details></tool-use>

<div class="cards" style="grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);">

        <div style="position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;background:#fefefb;border-top:0.5px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.08);box-shadow:0 -8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.05);">

          </div>

          <div style="padding:0 20px 24px;">
            <div style="background:rgba(0,0,0,0.03);height:36px;margin-bottom:10px;"></div>
            <div style="background:rgba(0,0,0,0.03);height:36px;margin-bottom:10px;"></div>
            <div style="background:rgba(0,0,0,0.03);height:36px;width:50%;"></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

    <div class="card-body">
      <h3>A. 直角纸片</h3>
      <p>完全去掉圆角。直边 + 0.5px 顶线 + 柔和上投影。纸张从画面底部升起，干净利落</p>
    </div>

          <!-- Title -->

          </div>
          <!-- Content -->
          <div style="padding:0 20px 20px;">
            <div style="background:rgba(0,0,0,0.03);height:36px;margin-bottom:10px;"></div>
            <div style="background:rgba(0,0,0,0.03);height:36px;margin-bottom:10px;"></div>

          </div>

    <div class="card-body">
      <h3>B. 浮纸卡片</h3>
      <p>四边内缩 8px，微圆角 6px，四面阴影。像一张浮起的便签纸，与 Modal 同源但适配底部</p>

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="zh">
<head>
<meta charset="utf-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1">
<title>Sheet 重设计</title>
<style>
  * { margin:0; padding:0; box-sizing:border-box; }
  body { font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; background:#111; color:#e5e5e5; padding:40px 32px 80px; }
  h1 { font-size:24px; font-weight:600; margin-bottom:8px; }
  .subtitle { font-size:14px; color:#888; margin-bottom:40px; }
  .grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap:28px; margin-bottom:48px; }
  .col { cursor:pointer; border:2px solid transparent; border-radius:12px; padding:4px; transition: border-color 0.2s; }
  .col:hover { border-color: rgba(100,160,255,0.3); }
  .col.selected { border-color: #4a9eff; }
  .phone { width:100%; aspect-ratio:9/16; background:#f0efed; border-radius:8px; overflow:hidden; position:relative; }
  .phone.dark { background:#1a1a1a; }
  .overlay { position:absolute; inset:0; }
  .overlay.light { background:rgba(0,0,0,0.15); }
  .overlay.dark { background:rgba(0,0,0,0.4); }
  .sheet-panel { position:absolute; bottom:0; left:0; right:0; }
  .handle-zone { display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; cursor:grab; }
  .content-line { height:36px; margin-bottom:10px; border-radius:0; }
  .content-line:last-child { margin-bottom:0; width:50%; }
  .tag { display:inline-block; font-size:11px; font-weight:600; padding:3px 8px; border-radius:4px; margin-bottom:12px; }
  .tag-a { background:rgba(74,158,255,0.15); color:#4a9eff; }
  .tag-b { background:rgba(120,200,120,0.15); color:#78c878; }
  .tag-c { background:rgba(220,160,80,0.15); color:#dca050; }
  .card-title { font-size:16px; font-weight:600; margin:16px 0 6px; }
  .card-desc { font-size:13px; color:#888; line-height:1.6; }
  .section-title { font-size:18px; font-weight:600; margin-bottom:8px; }
  .section-sub { font-size:13px; color:#888; margin-bottom:24px; }
  .indicator { position:fixed; bottom:0; left:0; right:0; background:rgba(0,0,0,0.85); backdrop-filter:blur(8px); padding:12px 24px; text-align:center; font-size:13px; color:#4a9eff; z-index:100; display:none; }
  .indicator.show { display:block; }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<h1>Sheet 重设计 — 形态探索</h1>

        <div class="handle-zone" style="height:24px;">
          <div style="width:20px; height:1.5px; background:rgba(255,255,255,0.12); border-radius:1px;"></div>
        </div>
        <div style="padding:0 20px 14px;">
          <div style="font-size:15px; font-weight:500; color:#e5e5e5;">评论详情</div>
        </div>
        <div style="padding:0 20px 20px;">
          <div class="content-line" style="background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);"></div>
          <div class="content-line" style="background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);"></div>
          <div class="content-line" style="background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);"></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="card-desc" style="margin-top:8px; text-align:center;">B. Dark</div>
  </div>

  <!-- C Dark -->
  <div class="col" data-choice="C" onclick="select(this)">
    <div class="phone dark">
      <div class="overlay dark"></div>
      <div class="sheet-panel">
        <div style="height:1px; background:linear-gradient(90deg, transparent 10%, rgba(255,255,255,0.06) 30%, rgba(255,255,255,0.06) 70%, transparent 90%);"></div>
        <div style="background:#252525;">
          <div style="display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between; padding:16px 20px 0;">
            <div style="font-size:15px; font-weight:500; color:#e5e5e5;">评论详情</div>
            <div style="width:22px; height:22px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; color:#666; font-size:14px; cursor:pointer;">✕</div>
          </div>
          <div style="padding:16px 20px 24px;">
            <div class="content-line" style="background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);"></div>
            <div class="content-line" style="background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);"></div>
            <div class="content-line" style="background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);"></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="card-desc" style="margin-top:8px; text-align:center;">C. Dark</div>
  </div>
</div>

<div id="indicator" class="indicator"></div>

<script>
let selected = null;
function select(el) {
  document.querySelectorAll('.col').forEach(c => c.classList.remove('selected'));
  el.classList.add('selected');
  // Also select all with same choice
  const choice = el.dataset.choice;
  document.querySelectorAll(`.col[data-choice="${choice}"]`).forEach(c => c.classList.add('selected'));
  selected = choice;
  const ind = document.getElementById('indicator');
  const labels = {A:'A. 直角纸片', B:'B. 浮纸卡片', C:'C. 平齐信笺'};
  ind.textContent = (labels[choice] || choice) + ' selected — return to terminal to continue';
  ind.classList.add('show');
}
</script>

</body>
</html>

```

     1→import { atom, useStore } from 'jotai'
     2→import type { FC, PropsWithChildren, ReactNode } from 'react'
     3→import * as React from 'react'
     4→import { useEffect, useImperativeHandle, useMemo, useState } from 'react'
     5→import { Drawer } from 'vaul'
     6→
     7→import { SheetContext } from './context'
     8→
     9→export interface PresentSheetProps {
    10→  content: ReactNode | FC
    11→  defaultOpen?: boolean
    12→  dismissible?: boolean
    13→  onOpenChange?: (value: boolean) => void
    14→  open?: boolean
    15→  title?: ReactNode
    16→  triggerAsChild?: boolean
    17→
    18→  zIndex?: number
    19→}
    20→
    21→export const sheetStackAtom = atom([] as HTMLDivElement[])
    22→
    23→export type SheetRef = {
    24→  dismiss: () => void
    25→}
    26→
    27→export const PresentSheet = ({
    28→  ref,
    29→  ...props
    30→}: PropsWithChildren<PresentSheetProps> & {
    31→  ref?: React.RefObject<SheetRef | null>
    32→}) => {
    33→  const {
    34→    content,
    35→    children,
    36→    zIndex = 1000,
    37→    title,
    38→    dismissible = true,
    39→    defaultOpen,
    40→    triggerAsChild,
    41→  } = props
    42→
    43→  const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = useState(props.open ?? defaultOpen)
    44→
    45→  useImperativeHandle(ref, () => ({
    46→    dismiss: () => {
    47→      setIsOpen(false)
    48→    },
    49→  }))
    50→
    51→  const nextRootProps = useMemo(() => {
    52→    const nextProps = {
    53→      onOpenChange: setIsOpen,
    54→    } as any
    55→    if (isOpen !== undefined) {
    56→      nextProps.open = isOpen
    57→    }
    58→
    59→    if (props.onOpenChange !== undefined) {
    60→      nextProps.onOpenChange = (v: boolean) => {
    61→        setIsOpen(v)
    62→        props.onOpenChange?.(v)
    63→      }
    64→    }
    65→
    66→    return nextProps
    67→  }, [props, isOpen, setIsOpen])
    68→
    69→  useEffect(() => {
    70→    if (props.open !== undefined) {
    71→      setIsOpen(props.open)
    72→    }
    73→  }, [props.open])
    74→  const [holderRef, setHolderRef] = useState<HTMLDivElement | null>()
    75→  const store = useStore()
    76→
    77→  useEffect(() => {
    78→    const holder = holderRef
    79→    if (!holder) return
    80→    store.set(sheetStackAtom, (p) => p.concat(holder))
    81→
    82→    return () => {
    83→      store.set(sheetStackAtom, (p) => p.filter((item) => item !== holder))
    84→    }
    85→  }, [holderRef, store])
    86→
    87→  const { Root } = Drawer
    88→
    89→  const overlayZIndex = zIndex - 1
    90→  const contentZIndex = zIndex
    91→
    92→  return (
    93→    <Root dismissible={dismissible} {...nextRootProps}>
    94→      {!!children && (
    95→        <Drawer.Trigger asChild={triggerAsChild}>{children}</Drawer.Trigger>
    96→      )}
    97→      <Drawer.Portal>
    98→        <Drawer.Content
    99→          className="fixed inset-x-0 bottom-0 flex max-h-[calc(100svh-5rem)] flex-col rounded-t-[10px] bg-neutral-1 p-4"
   100→          style={{
   101→            zIndex: contentZIndex,
   102→          }}
   103→        >
   104→          {dismissible && (
   105→            <div className="mx-auto mb-8 h-1.5 w-12 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-neutral-4" />
   106→          )}
   107→
   108→          {title && (
   109→            <Drawer.Title className="-mt-4 mb-4 flex justify-center text-lg font-medium">
   110→              {title}
   111→            </Drawer.Title>
   112→          )}
   113→
   114→          <SheetContext
   115→            value={useMemo(
   116→              () => ({
   117→                dismiss() {
   118→                  setIsOpen(false)
   119→                },
   120→              }),
   121→              [setIsOpen],
   122→            )}
   123→          >
   124→            {typeof content === 'function'
   125→              ? React.createElement(content)
   126→              : content}
   127→          </SheetContext>
   128→          <div ref={setHolderRef} />
   129→        </Drawer.Content>
   130→        <Drawer.Overlay
   131→          className="fixed inset-0 bg-neutral-9/40"
   132→          style={{
   133→            zIndex: overlayZIndex,
   134→          }}
   135→        />
   136→      </Drawer.Portal>
   137→    </Root>
   138→  )
   139→}
   140→
```

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-16 12:25:48Z)**_

完成。变更摘要：

- **背景**：`bg-neutral-1` → `bg-[#fefefb] dark:bg-neutral-2`（暖白纸色，同 Modal）
- **圆角**：`rounded-t-[10px]` → 移除（直角）
- **拖拽条**：移除，改为渐隐 gradient 顶线
- **标题**：居中 `text-lg` → 左对齐 `text-[15px] font-medium`（同 Modal）
- **关闭按钮**：新增 CloseIcon，右对齐
- **内边距**：`p-4` → `px-5 pb-5 pt-4`（同 Modal）
- **遮罩**：`bg-neutral-9/40` → `bg-neutral-9/25`

功能完全保留：vaul 下拉手势、dismissible 控制、sheetStack、ref.dismiss()。
